---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: "
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

**Maintenance Task Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task (e.g., cleanup, refactor, dependency update).

**Impact**
What parts of the project will this maintenance affect? (e.g., specific files, modules, workflows)

**Proposed Changes**
A clear and concise description of the changes needed to complete this maintenance task.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the maintenance task here.
